Resources

Free downloadable content for MEP professionals — families, templates, asset libraries, and reference data. All curated by JPA Designs and the Adelphos community.

Coming Soon

Free Revit Families

Production-grade MEP families with parameters that drive schedules, calcs, and tags out of the box.

Coming Soon

Project Templates

Pre-configured Revit templates for housing, commercial, healthcare, and education sectors.

Coming Soon

Asset Data Libraries

Manufacturer asset databases (radiators, AHUs, lights, fans) with COBie-compliant parameters.

Coming Soon

Setup Guides

Step-by-step guides for setting up the MEP Bridge platform, integrating with ACC, and deploying agents.
